title: Longitudinal methods for Alzheimer's cognitive status prediction with deep learning
authors: Houjun Liu; A. Weakley; H. Dodge; Xin Liu
abstract: Prediction of amnestic mild cognitive impairment (aMCI) and Alzheimer's disease (AD) using machine learning has primarily focused on short‐term predictions spanning 1–3 years. This study aimed to develop a new machine learning technique to extend predictions of cognitive status over 3–10 years from their last visit.
